description_long: This stone is an irregularly shaped, medium-sized rock with a predominantly white surface, interspersed with patches of gray, black, and subtle brownish hues. Its exterior appears smooth in some areas with a slightly glossy sheen, while other regions show more matte and rough textures, suggesting natural weathering. The stone features a mix of rounded and slightly angular contours, with some visible veins and mottling that add to its visual complexity. Darker mineral inclusions are scattered across the surface, creating a striking contrast against the lighter background. The overall form is compact and solid, with no visible cavities or openings. This type of stone could commonly be found as a landscape element or obstacle in urban parks, sidewalks, or roadside environments.
description: A compact, irregularly shaped white stone with gray and black patches, featuring a mix of smooth and rough textures and subtle mineral veining.
description_view_0: This view highlights the stone's broad, gently curved surface with prominent white coloration and a large dark patch on the right side.
description_view_1: From this angle, the stone appears more upright, showing a vertical face with two distinct dark spots and a more angular profile.
description_view_2: This side reveals a smoother, rounded surface with less pronounced dark inclusions and more subtle brownish streaks.
description_view_3: The top-down perspective emphasizes the stone's irregular outline, mottled surface, and a mix of white, brown, and black coloration.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on the ground
attribute_pattern: Irregular mottling and veining with scattered dark mineral inclusions, creating a natural, non-repetitive pattern.
attribute_weathering: Surface is mostly smooth with some matte areas, indicating moderate natural weathering and exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Typically contrasts with paved surfaces but may blend with other natural stones or landscaping elements; can be partially surrounded by grass or soil.
